name: Trend Etf Lbma Ouro Fundo Investimento Cotas De Fundo De Andice Investimento Exterior
summary: Trend Etf Lbma Ouro Fundo Investimento Cotas De Fundo De Andice Investimento Exterior is a fund that invests in gold. The fund aims to replicate the performance of the LBMA Gold Price Index, providing investors with exposure to the gold market. It is headquartered in Brazil.
